summary: Prior call: Caller reported a gas smell near 5th and Pine yesterday at 4:32 PM. No visible fire reported at the time. Caller was advised to leave the area and a human review was requested.
Prior call: Multiple shoulder incidents reported near US-101 south around exit 430 during evening traffic over the past week. Visibility is poor near the curve.
Prior call: A noise complaint at Elm Court last month escalated to a physical altercation. Responding unit recommended treating repeat Elm Court noise calls with caution.
